name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Critical Files and Directories for Endpoint
notes:
This Building Block defines critical files and directories for which permissions shouldn't be changed, and changes should be monitored for potential malicious activity.

Tune the building block to add or remove sensitive files and directories for monitoring.

By default, this Building block is watching the following files:
----- File Directories -----
/boot
/etc/pam.d
/etc/rsyslog
/etc/openldap
/etc/sysconfig/network-script
/var/spool/cron
/etc/cron* (e.g. /etc/cron.hourly, /etc/cron.weekly)
/etc/init.d
/bin/login
/bin/passwd
/etc/*.conf
 
 
----- Filename -----
/etc/shadow
/etc/passwd
/etc/sudoers
/etc/syslog.conf
/etc/crontab
/etc/gshadow
/etc/group
/etc/sysconfig/syslog
/etc/security/opasswd
/etc/default/ufw
.bash_history
/usr/bin
/usr/sbin
/bin
/boot
/usr/local/bin
/usr/local/sbin
/opt/bin
/opt/sbin


Windows
C:\autoexec.bat
C:\boot.ini
C:\config.sys
C:\Windows\system.ini
C:\Windows\win.ini
C:\Windows\regedit.exe
C:\Windows\System32\userinit.exe
C:\Windows\explorer.exe
C:\Program Files\Microsoft Security Client\msseces.exe
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Critical Files and Directories for Endpoint on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event matches Filename (custom) is not N/A, File Directory (custom) is not N/A

when the event matches LOWER("File Directory") IN ('/boot', '/etc/pam.d', '/etc/rsyslog', '/etc/openldap', '/etc/sysconfig/network-scripts', '/var/spool/cron', '/etc/cron%', '/etc/init.d', '/usr/bin', '/usr/sbin', '/bin', '/boot', '/usr/local/bin', '/usr/local/sbin', '/opt/bin', '/opt/sbin') OR (LOWER("File Directory") IN ('/etc') AND LOWER("Filename") IN ('shadow', 'passwd', 'sudoers', '%.conf', 'crontab', 'gshadow', 'group')) OR (LOWER("File Directory") IN ('/etc') AND LOWER("Filename") IN ('login', 'passwd')) OR (LOWER("File Directory") IN ('/etc/sysconfig') AND LOWER("Filename") IN ('syslog')) OR (LOWER("File Directory") IN ('/etc/security') AND LOWER("Filename") IN ('opasswd')) OR (LOWER("File Directory") IN ('/etc/default') AND LOWER("Filename") IN ('ufw')) OR LOWER("Filename") IN ('.bash_history') OR (LOWER("File Directory") IN ('c:') AND LOWER("Filename") IN ('autoexec.bat', 'boot.ini', 'config.sys')) OR (LOWER("File Directory") IN ('c:\windows') AND LOWER("Filename") IN ('system.ini', 'win.ini', 'regedit.exe', 'explorer.exe')) OR (LOWER("File Directory") IN ('c:\windows\system32') AND LOWER("Filename") IN ('userinit.exe')) OR (LOWER("File Directory") IN ('c:\program files\microsoft security client') AND LOWER("Filename") IN ('msseces.exe')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Critical Files and Directories for Endpoint on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event matches Filename (custom) is not N/A, File Directory (custom) is not N/A

AND when the event matches LOWER("File Directory") IN ('/boot', '/etc/pam.d', '/etc/rsyslog', '/etc/openldap', '/etc/sysconfig/network-scripts', '/var/spool/cron', '/etc/cron%', '/etc/init.d', '/usr/bin', '/usr/sbin', '/bin', '/boot', '/usr/local/bin', '/usr/local/sbin', '/opt/bin', '/opt/sbin')  OR (LOWER("File Directory") IN ('/etc') AND LOWER("Filename") IN ('shadow', 'passwd', 'sudoers', '%.conf', 'crontab', 'gshadow', 'group'))  OR (LOWER("File Directory") IN ('/etc') AND LOWER("Filename") IN ('login', 'passwd')) OR (LOWER("File Directory") IN ('/etc/sysconfig') AND LOWER("Filename") IN ('syslog'))  OR (LOWER("File Directory") IN ('/etc/security') AND LOWER("Filename") IN ('opasswd')) OR (LOWER("File Directory") IN ('/etc/default') AND LOWER("Filename") IN ('ufw')) OR LOWER("Filename") IN ('.bash_history') OR (LOWER("File Directory") IN ('c:') AND LOWER("Filename") IN ('autoexec.bat', 'boot.ini', 'config.sys')) OR (LOWER("File Directory") IN ('c:\windows') AND LOWER("Filename") IN ('system.ini', 'win.ini', 'regedit.exe', 'explorer.exe')) OR (LOWER("File Directory") IN ('c:\windows\system32') AND LOWER("Filename") IN ('userinit.exe')) OR (LOWER("File Directory") IN ('c:\program files\microsoft security client') AND LOWER("Filename") IN ('msseces.exe')) AQL filter query
